summary: Wave 10 Phase 1 plugin hardening: healthd daemon timeout protection + crash logging, lifecycle plugin error handling + state validation

details.healthd_daemon: Added runCheckWithTimeout() (30s max per check), logCrash() for persistent crash log (~/.opencode/healthd-crashes.json, last 10 entries), wired into uncaughtException handler
details.lifecycle_plugin: Wrapped _save() with try/catch + temp file cleanup, evaluateMany() with per-plugin error isolation, added validateState() method with required field + status enum validation, called from _load()
